channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: LA Galaxy strike early, hold off New York Red Bulls 2-1 to win their record 6th MLS Cup championship
item.description: CARSON, Calif. (AP) — Joseph Paintsil and Dejan Joveljic scored in the first half, and the LA Galaxy won their record sixth MLS Cup championship with a 2-1 victory over the New York Red Bulls on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: George Pickens fined over $20,000 after criticisms about behavior from head coach: report
item.description: Just days after Mike Tomlin said George Pickens needs to "grow up," the star receiver was reportedly hit with over $20,000 in fines from unsportsmanlike conduct penalties.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: College basketball fans break silence, storm the court as part of unique Christmas tradition
item.description: Taylor University basketball fans stormed the court Friday for the annual "Silent Night" game after junior Nate Paarlberg scored the Trojan's 10th point of the game on a breakaway.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: PETA calls on SMU to end live mascot program ahead of Peruna’s appearance ACC title game
item.description: PETA has called on SMU to end its live mascot program after the Mustangs announced the Peruna would attend the Atlantic Coast Conference championship game against Clemson on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chicago hosts conference rival Philadelphia
item.description: Philadelphia 76ers (6-15, 13th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (10-14, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Sunday, 1 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Nikola Vucevic and the Chicago Bulls take on Tyrese Maxey and the Philadelphia 76ers on Sunday. The Bulls are 8-7 in Eastern Conference games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jake Paul jokes that next opponent is 392-year-old shark
item.description: With all the jokes about Jake Paul's opponents, the YouTuber-turned-boxer joined in on the fun, saying his next opponent is a 392-year-old shark.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pro wrestling legend Eric Bischoff makes MLW debut and makes major impact
item.description: Pro wrestling legend Eric Bischoff made his Major League Wrestling debut on Thursday night, forming matches, confronting wrestlers and even firing someone.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Scottie Scheffler goes on a run of birdies in the Bahamas and leads by 2
item.description: NASSAU, Bahamas (AP) — Scottie Scheffler birdied every hole but the par 3s on the front nine at Albany Golf Club on Friday and finished his bogey-free round with an 8-under 64 that gave him a two-shot lead in the Hero World Challenge. Two months off did nothing to slow the world's No. 1 player.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No Bevo? SEC tells Texas there's no room for its 1,700-pound longhorn at title game vs. Georgia
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The Southeastern Conference championship game will not feature another mascot showdown. The league said there wasn't enough space on the sideline at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta for No. 2 Texas to bring along its 1,700-pound longhorn Bevo XV. The Longhorns are facing No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Indiana plays Chicago on 8-game road slide
item.description: Indiana Pacers (9-14, 10th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (10-13, eighth in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Friday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Pacers -3; over/under is 247 BOTTOM LINE: Indiana travels to Chicago looking to break its eight-game road losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Texas Longhorns' live mascot, Bevo, barred from SEC championship
item.description: The University of Texas' live mascot, Bevo, will not be at the SEC title game because his 1,700-pound stature is not suitable for the stadium.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Batty, Ferrin named to All-Big 12 first team
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Three Cougars were named first-team All-Big 12 including defensive end Tyler Batty, offensive left tackle Caleb Etienne and kicker Will Ferrin. In addition, senior defensive back Jakob Robinson and junior kick returner Keelan Marion earned All-Big 12 Second Team honors.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Blackhawks' losing streak reaches 4 games after 4-2 loss to Bruins
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Brad Marchand and Morgan Geekie each scored two goals, and the Boston Bruins beat the struggling Chicago Blackhawks, 4-2 , on Wednesday night. Boston posted its third consecutive win — all in the past four days. It rallied for a 3-2 overtime victory against Detroit on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah State announces 2025 signing class
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State interim head football coach Nate Dreiling announced portions of USU’s signing class on Wednesday, as part of the NCAA Early Signing Day. The class, which includes 20 total players, is comprised of 17 high school athletes and three junior college transfers.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah HC falls at home to Dallas, 2-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Casey DeSmith made 34 saves for the Dallas Stars, who held on to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 2-1 at Delta Center on Monday. It was DeSmith's first win since Oct. 24.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Giddey gets a triple-double as the Bulls race past the Nets for a 128-102 victory
item.description: Josh Giddey had 20 points, 13 rebounds and 11 assists, helping the Chicago Bulls beat the Brooklyn Nets 128-102 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Michigan seeking to play Northwestern at Soldier Field in 2025
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — College football season is over for Northwestern University, but that hasn't stopped higher-ups in the administration from weighing venue options for one of its high profile matchups in 2025. According to rg.org's Paul M.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: BYU eliminated from Big 12 contention, beats Houston
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU learned it was eliminated from Big 12 Championship Game contention at halftime, but the Cougars still had a job to do. Jake Retzlaff ran for two touchdowns and threw for 167 yards to lead No. 19 BYU to a 30-18 victory over Houston on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Montrose def. Pueblo West 18-7 to advance to the championship game
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— The Montrose Red Hawks are heading to the Class 4A state championship game after defeating the Pueblo West Cyclones 18-7 in a hard-fought semifinal matchup.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5
